[[Viscountess]] '''Mireya''' was a noblewoman from [[Vjun/Legends|Vjun]] who married into [[House Mecetti]] through [[High Lord]] [[Tritum XI]]. She brought with her [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] teachings that corrupted the House's protector organization, the [[Mecrosa Order]], turning it into a [[Sith cult/Legends|Sith cult]] that spawned its own [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lords]].

{{Char-stub}}
